task_completion.description: Create the 'Renovation Planning' forum board with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a forum board named 'Renovation Planning' in the Redmine project's forums list or settings. The description should include 'renovation design and planning decisions'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Logistics & Scheduling' forum board with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a forum board named 'Logistics & Scheduling' in the Redmine project's forums list or settings. The description should include 'Coordination of timelines'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Floor Plan Review - 3rd Floor' topic in the Renovation Planning forum.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Renovation Planning' forum, look for a saved topic titled 'Floor Plan Review - 3rd Floor'. The body of the message must be visible and mention 'open office layout'.

task_completion.description: Post a reply to the 'Floor Plan Review - 3rd Floor' topic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Floor Plan Review - 3rd Floor' topic thread, look for a saved reply post that includes the suggestion to 'add a quiet workspace area'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'IT Equipment Moving Schedule' topic in the Logistics & Scheduling forum.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Logistics & Scheduling' forum, look for a saved topic titled 'IT Equipment Moving Schedule'. The body of the message must be visible and mention 'relocating all IT equipment'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Redmine web GUI to create the forums and topics.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the Redmine interface being actively used, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The topics and replies were actually submitted and saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: The forums, topics, and replies should appear as rendered, published elements on the Redmine site, not just text typed into unsaved input fields.

integrity.description: The content appears to be genuinely entered into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of a text editor being used to fake the output, and the Redmine UI styling should appear normal without signs of DOM manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Boards: 'Renovation Planning' (description must include 'renovation design') and 'Logistics & Scheduling' (description must include 'Coordination of timelines'). Expected Topics: 'Floor Plan Review - 3rd Floor' (body must include 'open office layout') in the Renovation Planning board, and 'IT Equipment Moving Schedule' (body must include 'relocating all IT equipment') in the Logistics & Scheduling board. Expected Reply: A reply to the 'Floor Plan Review' topic containing 'quiet workspace'.
